summary: Completed follow-up tour guide verification for 8 routes (5 outlet pages + 3 other portals). All expected tour options are now properly wired and rendering correctly.

design_issues.issue: React warning: borderRadius prop should be lowercase borderradius
design_issues.impact: Console warning only, no functional impact

passed_tests: All tour welcome modals render correctly
React-joyride tooltips render and anchor to page elements
Tour navigation buttons (Lanjut/Selesai/Kembali/Lewati) present and functional

notes: All 5 outlet inventory/budget tours now properly registered in tourRegistry
Each route shows its page-specific tour option (not just general-navigation fallback)
SUPER_ADMIN can access all tested portals (outlet, finance, admin, procurement)
Tour flow verified: help button → popover → tour option → welcome modal → joyride tooltip
Minor timing issue on /admin/approvals where joyride tooltip visibility check was delayed, but tour still functional
